creator: freebsdbug@patpro.net
text:
Hi all,


Same problem here. Everything was fine in 10.1-RELEASE, but since I've upgraded to 10.3-RELEASE, it fails with core dump.

I've tried to gdb the thingy, and it yields to this:

$ gdb ipmitool ipmitool.core

Program terminated with signal 11, Segmentation fault.

I've tried to reinstall/recompile the port. No luck either.
